title: Code with Claude 2026 | Tokyo
summary: Anthropic held Code with Claude 2026 in Tokyo, a conference featuring announcements about Claude models, the Claude Platform, and Claude Code, with demonstrations from partner organizations Canva, Mizuho, and NRI.
writeup: Anthropic's Code with Claude 2026 conference in Tokyo covers announcements across three areas: Claude models, the Claude Platform, and Claude Code. The session includes demonstrations from partner organizations Canva, Mizuho, and NRI. The event signals Anthropic's focus on developer tooling and the Japanese market, with partner demos illustrating how these organizations apply the platform and coding tools in practice.
